description: pb-hcf hooks. SessionStart auto-runs scripts/discover-hooks.sh and injects the resolved per-hook agent enrollment table into Claude's session context. This prevents the LLM-improvises-bash failure mode where HCF's plan-create / plan-orchestrate report empty hooks because the improvised glob enumeration crashed silently (PPS 2026-06-30: invalid `for f in $LOC/*.md 2>/dev/null` syntax aborted enumeration at line 35; partial output was consumed as ground truth). See feedback_hcf_discovery_non_deterministic.md for the full diagnosis.
